preferred_name: Control and auxiliary circuits for Relay for thermistor protection (PTC)

preferred_name_ml.en: Control and auxiliary circuits for Relay for thermistor protection (PTC)
preferred_name_ml.fr: Circuits de commande et auxiliaire pour Relais de protection à thermistance (CTP)
preferred_name_ml.zh: 热敏电阻（PTC）保护继电器的控制和辅助电路

definition: all the conductive parts of the relay for thermistor protection which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit

definition_ml.en: all the conductive parts of the relay for thermistor protection which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit
definition_ml.fr: ensemble des pièces conductrices du relais de protection à thermistance destinées à être insérées dans un circuit autre que le circuit principal
definition_ml.de: alle leitfähigen Teile des Thermistormotorschutzrelais (PTC), die zu anderen Stromkreisen als dem Hauptstromkreis des Geräts gehören
definition_ml.zh: 在主电路之外的电路中使用的热敏电阻保护继电器的所有导电部件
